## Review Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` was run and `registry.json` is updated
- [ ] Manifest is declarative and contains no secrets
- [ ] Helper commands are named as capabilities, not embedded as shell scripts
- [ ] README explains required external setup and safety boundaries
